title: anthemis werneri subsp. insularum
intro: Anthemis werneri subsp. insularum, also known as Insular Anthemis, is a rare plant species endemic to the island of Corsica, characterized by its distinctive leaves and daisy-like flowers. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Insular Anthemis include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce menstrual cramps, and alleviate respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Insular Anthemis can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
